title: Re-Zero-Totem-Sound
description: This resource pack plays a special "death" sound 💀 inspired by the anime Re:Zero 🎥 whenever you use the Totem of Undying in Minecraft. Made By Berkay3435TR.✨
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yZGUX-hq_9Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>This resource pack plays a special "death" sound 💀 inspired by the anime Re:Zero 🎥 whenever you use the Totem of Undying in Minecraft .

- Easy to install ⚙️ and compatible with Minecraft 1.21.x versions 📦.
